mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_activity (title, start_time, end_time, longitude, latitude, radius, target_classes, create_user_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{radius}, #{targetClasses}, #{createUserId})
mapper.update:
update t_activity
title = #{title},
start_time = #{startTime},
end_time = #{endTime},
where id = #{id}
